summary: Iteration 9 testing COMPLETE - All features verified working. Route rename /attendance→/presenze, Cedolini with real data (14 records), Anagrafica stats (34/32/2), toggle buttons, Ferie page with 4 action buttons, employee deduplication (only 1 Posligua Orozco), and all backend APIs passing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 tested all requested features: (1) /presenze URL works with 32 dipendenti in calendar grid, (2) /cedolini shows 14 buste paga for 2026 with employee names (VALERIO CERALDI, TAIANO LUIGI, etc.) and periods (Gen 2026) - no 'undefined', (3) /dipendenti Dashboard stats: TOTALI=34, ATTIVI=32, CESSATI=2, Anagrafica has 34 toggle buttons 'In carico' (green), (4) /saldi-ferie-permessi shows 34 dipendenti with 4 action buttons per row (Dettagli, Edit, Calendar/modifica periodo, Trash/elimina), (5) Only 1 'Posligua Orozco William Manuel' employee (duplicate merged), (6) All 10 backend tests pass including DELETE and PUT periodo endpoints.
pages_tested: /presenze - PASS (32 dipendenti calendar grid, renamed from /attendance)
/cedolini - PASS (14 buste paga with real names and Gen 2026 period)
/dipendenti/anagrafica - PASS (34 rows with 'In carico' toggle buttons)
/saldi-ferie-permessi - PASS (34 dipendenti with 4 action buttons each)
